module_role: Module 1 of v17 integration — canonical primitives only, no World/Faction/Territory classes. Wired into mc_v17 by Module 7.

entries.quoted_text: Cathedral (+2 PT/season, +0.5 PT to adjacent territories)

entries.assumption: ASSUMPTION-4: stacks linearly per Cathedral, direct-adjacent only, no cap, no decay

entries.quoted_text: Church Seizure Ob: 10 − PT − infrastructure modifiers (floor 1)
T8 | Gransol | PV 4 | SW 3 (trading city; strong Church commercial presence)
T9 | Himmelenger | PV 5 | SW 5 (cathedral city; Church's primary anchor)
T14 | Ehrenfeld | PV 3 | SW 3 (military stronghold with significant Church benediction tradition)
T15 | Askeheim | PV 0 | SW 0 (Calamity ground; Church presence impossible)
Cathedral | +1 Order at installation + Order decay −1
Cathedral | ... Order decay −1 (Order is more stable)
80 | Church Ascendant | Seizure Ob reduced by 1 globally. All territory PT drifts +1 toward piety pole at Year-End (unless Warden Cooperation ≥ 2)
The Church may declare a Mass Seizure when CI ≥ 60
Church ... adds floor(CI/20) bonus dice to its roll
entries.note: Constant declared in M1 for cross-module reference; not used by M1 primitives. Applied by M2.

entries.assumption: ASSUMPTION-3: 15 playable territories matches v15 scope; T15 Askeheim (Calamity, no settlements) and T16 Schoenland (foreign-exempt) excluded from CI/PT/Seizure mechanics

entries.quoted_text: Askeheim is unincorporated Calamity wilderness with 0 settlements (the Ruins and the Gate are observation features, not siege-targets). ... Schoenland at degree 1 is foreign-exempt awaiting ED-055.

entries.value: 16-territory neighbour graph (T1..T17 excluding implicit T16-S-037 edge handling)
entries.note: Mirrors v15's ADJACENCY exactly for behavioural compatibility. Underlying canon source is valoria_geography_v30.yaml :: adjacency:.

entries.value: 37 entries (35 Kingdom + S-036 Himmelenger + S-037 Schoenland)
entries.quoted_text: Total: 37 march-target settlements (35 Kingdom + 1 Church city-state + 1 foreign tributary). Province distribution: Valorsmark 6 provinces (15 settlements), Hafenmark 4 provinces (10), Varfell 4 provinces (10).
entries.assumption: ASSUMPTION-1 (GAP-A): Source-of-truth conflict between settlement_layer §2.1 (37 settlements with siege-target granularity per PP-726 rebuild) and valoria_geography_v30.yaml (36 settlements with district-as-settlement schema; tagged PP-726 in commit message but data not migrated). M1 sourced from settlement_layer §2.1. Separate editorial fix needed to migrate geography YAML.

entries.quoted_text: S-036 Himmelenger ... Sovereign ecclesiastical city-state. Internal districts: Cathedral (the Confessor's seat), City (lay Church administration, Cardinal of Temperance), Seminary (theological training, Inquisitor recruitment).
entries.assumption: ASSUMPTION-2 (GAP-B): Only S-036 starts with Church infrastructure (Cathedral + Templar Station + Church Governor; Inquisitor Base = false). Backwards-compatible with mc_v15's `Territory.templar = (tid == 'T9')`. All other 36 settlements start clean. Conservative seeding pending Jordan ratification of a fuller starting registry.

entries.value: Snap to next canon-tier boundary, cap at tier 5
entries.quoted_text: All territory PT drifts +1 toward piety pole at Year-End (unless Warden Cooperation ≥ 2)
entries.assumption: ASSUMPTION-5: +1 interpreted in canon-tier units (not v15 float units). Implementation: pt_float_to_tier → +1 → PT_TIER_TO_FLOAT lookup. Capped at tier 5 (float 7.0).

entries.value: Universally 0 (drift always fires when triggered by CI 80)
entries.assumption: ASSUMPTION-6: Warden Cooperation not modelled in mc_v15. Treated as 0 universally until M5 or later. Drift fires unconditionally at CI 80. M5 implementer must add Warden Cooperation tracking and revise this primitive's call site.

provisional_assumptions.topic: GAP-A: Settlement registry source of truth
provisional_assumptions.decision: Use settlement_layer_v30 §2.1 (37 settlements; siege-target granularity per PP-726 rebuild)
provisional_assumptions.alternative_rejected: valoria_geography_v30.yaml (36 settlements, district-as-settlement schema; tagged PP-726 in commit but data not migrated)
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: Editorial fix: migrate valoria_geography_v30.yaml settlements: dict to match §2.1 registry. Separate task from M1.

provisional_assumptions.topic: GAP-B: Starting infrastructure state per settlement
provisional_assumptions.decision: S-036 Himmelenger: Cathedral + Templar + Church Governor (Inquisitor: false). All other 36 settlements: no Church infrastructure.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Backwards-compatible with mc_v15.py `templar = (tid == 'T9')`. Canon §2.2 supports Cathedral at Himmelenger via internal districts. Conservative seeding.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: Jordan to ratify or expand starting registry (e.g., Valorsplatz Chapel? Ehrenfeld Chapel given T14 SW=3?). Editorial entry needed.

provisional_assumptions.decision: 15 playable territories matching mc_v15's ALL_PLAYABLE_15: T1..T14, T17. T15 (Askeheim, Calamity) and T16 (Schoenland, foreign) registered but inert.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Manifest says '37 settlements mapped to 15 territories'. ci_political §1 SW table has 17 entries; 2 are inert. Consistent with v15 scope.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: None — this aligns scope across all modules.

provisional_assumptions.topic: GAP-D: Cathedral adjacency PT bonus mechanics
provisional_assumptions.decision: +0.5 PT per Cathedral to each direct-adjacent territory. Stacks linearly. No cap, no distance decay.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Canon (§1.5 Axis 1) specifies +0.5 PT to adjacent but does not specify stacking/cap/decay.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: Sim feedback may reveal degenerate cases (e.g., Cathedral cluster in T9 + T8 + T14 → T1 receives massive PT drift). Re-examine after M7 balance sweep.

provisional_assumptions.decision: Drift +1 in canon-tier units (0..5), snapping to PT_TIER_TO_FLOAT. Capped at tier 5.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Canon (§2.1) says '+1 toward piety pole'. v15 PT space is float 1.0–7.0 with non-uniform tier spacing. Canon-tier-aware drift is the canonical interpretation.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: Sim feedback may reveal undesirable PT lock-in patterns. Reconsider if drift produces homogeneity.

provisional_assumptions.topic: GAP-F: Warden Cooperation gate on PT drift
provisional_assumptions.decision: Warden Cooperation = 0 universally; drift always fires when CI 80 triggers.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Warden Cooperation is not modelled in mc_v15. Drift suppression is the canonical fallback (per §2.1).
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: Module 5 (Settlement-Territory Aggregation) or later must add Warden Cooperation tracking. Re-thread ci_ascendant_pt_drift's warden_cooperation argument at integration time.
